label: modes_no_args
stdout:
Usage: python -m doxa_research modes [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  List research modes with provider/model/kind.

Options:
  -h, --help  Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  add            `doxa modes add` — see `doxa help modes` for examples.
  copy           `doxa modes copy` — see `doxa help modes` for examples.
  list           List research modes.
  remove         `doxa modes remove` — see `doxa help modes` for examples.
  rename         `doxa modes rename` — see `doxa help modes` for examples.
  set            `doxa modes set` — see `doxa help modes` for examples.
  set-default    `doxa modes set-default` — see `doxa help modes` for...
  unset          `doxa modes unset` — see `doxa help modes` for examples.
  unset-default  `doxa modes unset-default` — see `doxa help modes` for...

  Mutation operations:
    doxa modes add NAME --model MODEL [--description D] [--kind K]
    doxa modes set NAME KEY VALUE
    doxa modes unset NAME KEY
    doxa modes remove NAME
    doxa modes rename OLD NEW
    doxa modes copy SRC DST [--from-profile X] [--override]
    doxa modes set-default NAME
    doxa modes unset-default

  All mutators support: --project | --config PATH | --profile X | --json. Use
  --override with add/copy to create a builtin-name override in the selected
  tier.
